title: Inventory Hud +
description: Inventory HUD+ is a lightweight Fabric mod for Minecraft  that displays armor and tool durability directly on screen, along with key inventory items. Designed for PvP and survival players, it gives you instant gear awareness so you can react faster
body:
![Armor Durability Display & Inventory view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a58c9df1a564e0cd1cdfe4d7dc4da4c5a5398ae.jpeg)!!⚔️ Inventory HUD+ — Stay Battle-Ready at All Times
Never get caught with broken gear again. Inventory HUD+ is a lightweight, PvP-friendly mod that displays your armor and tool durability directly on screen—plus your inventory items—so you can focus on the fight, not your hotbar.

🛡️ Features:
Live durability tracking for all equipped armor and held tools

On-screen inventory preview so you can monitor gaps, and gear at a glance

Minimal UI footprint designed for clarity and speed in combat

Perfect for PvP, UHC, and competitive survival

Whether you're mid-duel or deep in a dungeon, Inventory HUD+ keeps your gear status front and center. No more surprise breaks. No more blind inventory swaps. Just pure tactical awareness.

🔧 Compatibility:
Built for Minecraft 1.21+

Fabric modloader

Works seamlessly with most HUD and combat mods                                                                  My Youtube channel www.youtube.com/@SoulSpeedd
